title: Enki and Ninhursag: Paradise of Dilmun

translation.text: The land of Dilmun was pure, the land of Dilmun was clean. In Dilmun the raven uttered no cry, the dog did not crouch in fear, the lion did not slay, the wolf did not snatch the lamb. There no widow said 'I am a widow,' no woman said 'I am old.'
